settings.title: Holds Moisture
settings.text: Keeps roots hydrated longer between watering while helping reduce dry pockets.

settings.title: Supports Strong Roots

settings.title: Naturally Renewable

settings.heading: Why Gardeners Choose Coiriva
settings.subheading: Premium coconut coir engineered for healthier plants, stronger roots, and easier everyday gardening.

settings.title: Place the Brick
settings.text: Set the compact coco coir brick in a bucket, tray, or garden container.

settings.title: Add Water
settings.text: Hydrate with water and let the natural coconut fibers loosen and expand.

settings.title: Watch It Expand
settings.text: One brick expands 8–10X into a light, airy growing medium.

settings.title: Start Planting
settings.text: Use it for seedlings, pots, raised beds, herbs, vegetables, and more.

settings.subheading: Coiriva makes it easy to turn one compact coconut coir brick into a clean, airy growing medium your plants will love.

settings.name: Sarah M.
settings.title: My seedlings finally stayed hydrated.
settings.text: The coir expanded quickly and gave my plants a clean, fluffy growing mix. It holds moisture without feeling heavy.

settings.name: David R.
settings.title: Easy to store, easy to use.
settings.text: I like that the bricks are compact until I need them. Add water, wait a few minutes, and I have plenty of growing medium.

settings.title: Great for container gardening.
settings.text: The texture is light and airy, and my patio plants seem happier. It mixes well with my usual potting soil.
